name: commons-v2
title: Commons V2
description: TypeScript rewrite of The Commons — modular client connecting to commons-server
rationale: Phase 3 of the Commons Architecture Rebuild Spec: replace 2965-line monolith (grazing.html) with ES modules. Renderer is a pure function, state mutations isolated to network.ts and local-player.ts, snapshot interpolation for remote entities, client-side prediction with server reconciliation.
